permission.title: Camera & Microphone Access
permission.description: To join this video call, we need access to your camera and microphone.
permission.descriptionGranted: You can now join the video call.
permission.requesting: Please allow access in your browser...

instructions.title: How to enable permissions:
instructions.chrome: Click the camera icon in the address bar
instructions.firefox: Click the camera icon in the address bar
instructions.safari: Go to Safari Settings › Privacy › Camera/Microphone

errors.denied: Camera and microphone access denied. Please check your browser settings and allow access.
errors.notFound: No camera or microphone found. Please connect a device and try again.
errors.inUse: Camera or microphone is already in use by another application.
errors.generic: Unable to access camera and microphone. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

error.title: Call Error
error.message: An unexpected error occurred during the call.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting:
troubleshooting.permissions: Make sure you granted camera and microphone permissions
troubleshooting.browser: Check that your browser supports video calls (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
troubleshooting.https: Ensure you are using HTTPS connection
